logger.doc:name: Log Transform Complete
logger.message: #[output application/json --- {correlationId: correlationId, action: 'TRANSFORM_PO_TO_WMS_COMPLETE', wmsOrderId: payload.wmsOrderId, timestamp: now()}]

ee:message.ee:set-payload: %dw 2.0 output application/json --- { erpTransactionId: "ERP-INV-" ++ uuid(), sourceSystem: "WMS", transactionType: "INVENTORY_UPDATE", inventoryData: { plant: vars.originalPayload.warehouseId, materialNumber: vars.originalPayload.sku, stockType: "UNRESTRICTED", availableStock: vars.originalPayload.quantityAvailable, reservedStock: vars.originalPayload.quantityReserved, totalStock: vars.originalPayload.quantityAvailable + vars.originalPayload.quantityReserved, lastCountDate: vars.originalPayload.lastUpdated as String {format: "yyyy-MM-dd'T'HH:mm:ss'Z'"}, unitOfMeasure: "EA" }, metadata: { correlationId: correlationId, processedAt: now() as String {format: "yyyy-MM-dd'T'HH:mm:ss.SSSZ"}, sourceTransactionId: vars.idempotencyKey } }

logger.doc:name: Log Transform Complete
logger.message: #[output application/json --- {correlationId: correlationId, action: 'TRANSFORM_INV_TO_ERP_COMPLETE', erpTransactionId: payload.erpTransactionId, timestamp: now()}]

ee:message.ee:set-payload: %dw 2.0 output application/json --- { erpTransactionId: "ERP-SHIP-" ++ uuid(), sourceSystem: "WMS", transactionType: "SHIPMENT_CONFIRMATION", deliveryData: { deliveryNumber: vars.originalPayload.shipmentId, purchaseOrderNumber: vars.originalPayload.poNumber, carrierCode: vars.originalPayload.carrier, trackingNumber: vars.originalPayload.trackingNumber, shipDate: vars.originalPayload.shippedDate as String {format: "yyyy-MM-dd'T'HH:mm:ss'Z'"}, deliveryStatus: "SHIPPED", goodsMovementType: "601" }, lineItems: vars.originalPayload.items map ((item, index) -> { lineNumber: index + 1, materialNumber: item.sku, deliveredQuantity: item.quantityShipped, unitOfMeasure: "EA", movementType: "601" }), metadata: { correlationId: correlationId, processedAt: now() as String {format: "yyyy-MM-dd'T'HH:mm:ss.SSSZ"}, sourceTransactionId: vars.originalPayload.shipmentId } }

logger.doc:name: Log Transform Complete
logger.message: #[output application/json --- {correlationId: correlationId, action: 'TRANSFORM_SHIP_TO_ERP_COMPLETE', erpTransactionId: payload.erpTransactionId, timestamp: now()}]

ee:message.ee:set-payload: %dw 2.0 output application/json var statusMapping = { "PENDING": "10", "IN_PROGRESS": "20", "COMPLETED": "30", "CANCELLED": "90", "ON_HOLD": "15" } --- { erpTransactionId: "ERP-PICK-" ++ uuid(), sourceSystem: "WMS", transactionType: "PICKING_STATUS", pickingData: { pickingOrderNumber: vars.originalPayload.pickId, plant: vars.originalPayload.warehouseId, purchaseOrderNumber: vars.originalPayload.poNumber, pickingStatus: upper(vars.originalPayload.status), erpStatusCode: statusMapping[upper(vars.originalPayload.status)] default "00", statusUpdateTime: vars.originalPayload.updatedAt as String {format: "yyyy-MM-dd'T'HH:mm:ss'Z'"}, warehouseTask: "PICK" }, metadata: { correlationId: correlationId, processedAt: now() as String {format: "yyyy-MM-dd'T'HH:mm:ss.SSSZ"}, sourceTransactionId: vars.originalPayload.pickId } }

logger.doc:name: Log Transform Complete
logger.message: #[output application/json --- {correlationId: correlationId, action: 'TRANSFORM_PICK_TO_ERP_COMPLETE', erpTransactionId: payload.erpTransactionId, timestamp: now()}]
